summary: Comprehensive testing of new payment-first registration flow and membership card features. All features tested and working: Registration page with plan selection and photo upload, Razorpay payment integration, membership card display with plan/validity, photo upload endpoint.
passed_tests: Registration page loads with form and plan selection
Plans are loaded dynamically from API
Photo upload section is visible
Can select different plans
Submit button shows selected plan price
Date of birth field has correct validation
Referral ID field accepts employee and associate IDs
Password visibility toggle works
Password mismatch shows validation error
Mobile number validation requires 10 digits
Secure payment info is displayed
Link to login page works
Required field validation on empty submit
Registration form submits and opens Razorpay
Member dashboard loads with member data
Dashboard has tab navigation (My Card, Experiences, Benefits)
Membership card displays correctly
QR code renders on membership card
Download card button is present and functional
Share card button is present and functional
Membership validity section displays correctly
Profile details show member information
Experiences tab shows lifestyle image gallery
Benefits tab shows partner discounts
Logout button works correctly
Card front side shows member photo placeholder, name, ID, QR code, plan, validity
Card back side shows terms, contact info, usage instructions
Flip card button toggles between front and back
Upload Photo button is present and functional
Download PDF button triggers card download
Download Image button triggers image download
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing test member (mobile: 7777777777, password: member123)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All membership registration flow features tested and working: 1) Registration page loads with plan selection (4 plans: Silver/Gold/Platinum/Individual) fetched dynamically from API. 2) Photo upload section visible with camera icon. 3) Form validation works (password mismatch, mobile 10 digits, required fields). 4) Razorpay payment integration working - initiate API creates real Razorpay order (order_xxx format). 5) Complete API validates payment signature before creating user/member records. 6) Member dashboard shows membership card with plan name and validity dates. 7) Existing test member 7777777777 shows 'Not Selected' plan and 'Pending' dates because it was created with old flow (no member record in members collection) - this is expected. New registrations via the payment flow will have proper plan/validity data.

notes.registration_flow: POST /api/registration/initiate creates temp registration + Razorpay order, POST /api/registration/complete verifies payment and creates user + member records with active status
notes.razorpay_integration: Real Razorpay test mode integration - creates actual order_xxx IDs
notes.photo_upload: Base64 photo can be included during registration, stored in uploads directory, URL saved in member record
